untranslatable_reason: Signal requires order imbalance (buy volume - sell volume) calculation and intraday time-of-day filtering (GMT hour windows), plus minute-level microstructure analysis. The allowed indicators set does not include: (1) order book imbalance metrics (bid/ask volume separation), (2) intraday time filtering by GMT hour, (3) minute-level granularity aggregation, or (4) ML-derived low-frequency trader detection. Volume clustering and microstructure inefficiencies cannot be expressed with standard OHLCV indicators alone.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally a microstructure-based trading rule requiring real-time order book data and minute-level time-of-day context. The core ML feature (order imbalance) is not available in the standard indicator set. Placeholders were inserted but the rule cannot be validly translated without access to bid/ask volume data and intraday scheduling logic.
